# WebAudit Pro

> AI-powered website auditing tool that analyzes SEO, performance, security, and accessibility, then quantifies the revenue impact of each issue.

WebAudit Pro scans any public website and produces a detailed audit report covering SEO, Core Web Vitals, security headers, schema/structured data, AI crawler readiness, and competitor benchmarking. Each finding includes an estimated revenue impact so users can prioritize fixes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Run a free website audit and view the full report.
